lines.english: Lesson 139
lines.chinese: 第139课
lines.raw: Lesson 139 | 第139课

lines.english: Is that you, John?
lines.chinese: 是你吗，约翰？
lines.raw: Is that you, John? | 是你吗，约翰？

lines.english: Listen to the tape then answer this question.
lines.chinese: 听录音，然后回答这个问题。
lines.raw: Listen to the tape then answer this question. | 听录音，然后回答这个问题。

lines.english: Which John Smith does Graham Turner think he is talking to?
lines.chinese: 格雷厄姆·特纳认为他正在和哪位约翰·史密斯通话？
lines.raw: Which John Smith does Graham Turner think he is talking to? | 格雷厄姆·特纳认为他正在和哪位约翰·史密斯通话？

lines.english: Is that you, John?
lines.chinese: 是你吗，约翰？
lines.raw: Is that you, John? | 是你吗，约翰？

lines.english: Yes, speaking.
lines.chinese: 是的，我就是。
lines.raw: Yes, speaking. | 是的，我就是。

lines.english: Tell Mary we'll be late for dinner this evening.
lines.chinese: 告诉玛丽，我们今晚晚饭会迟到。
lines.raw: Tell Mary we'll be late for dinner this evening. | 告诉玛丽，我们今晚晚饭会迟到。

lines.english: I'm afraid I don't understand.
lines.chinese: 恐怕我不明白。
lines.raw: I'm afraid I don't understand. | 恐怕我不明白。

lines.english: Hasn't Mary told you?
lines.chinese: 玛丽没告诉你吗？
lines.raw: Hasn't Mary told you? | 玛丽没告诉你吗？

lines.english: She invited Charlotte and me to dinner this evening.
lines.chinese: 她邀请夏洛特和我今晚吃饭。
lines.raw: She invited Charlotte and me to dinner this evening. | 她邀请夏洛特和我今晚吃饭。

lines.english: I said I would be at your house at six o'clock, but the boss wants me to do some extra work.
lines.chinese: 我说我六点钟会到你家，但老板要我加班。
lines.raw: I said I would be at your house at six o'clock, but the boss wants me to do some extra work. | 我说我六点钟会到你家，但老板要我加班。

lines.english: I'll have to stay at the office.
lines.chinese: 我得留在办公室。
lines.raw: I'll have to stay at the office. | 我得留在办公室。

lines.english: I don't know when I'll finish.
lines.chinese: 我不知道什么时候能完。
lines.raw: I don't know when I'll finish. | 我不知道什么时候能完。

lines.english: Oh, and by the way, my wife wants to know if Mary needs any help.
lines.chinese: 哦，顺便说一下，我妻子想知道玛丽是否需要帮忙。
lines.raw: Oh, and by the way, my wife wants to know if Mary needs any help. | 哦，顺便说一下，我妻子想知道玛丽是否需要帮忙。

lines.english: I don't know what you're talking about.
lines.chinese: 我不知道你在说什么。
lines.raw: I don't know what you're talking about. | 我不知道你在说什么。

lines.english: That is John Smith, isn't it?
lines.chinese: 你是约翰·史密斯，对吗？
lines.raw: That is John Smith, isn't it? | 你是约翰·史密斯，对吗？

lines.english: Yes, I'm John Smith.
lines.chinese: 是的，我就是约翰·史密斯。
lines.raw: Yes, I'm John Smith. | 是的，我就是约翰·史密斯。

lines.english: You are John Smith, the engineer, aren't you?
lines.chinese: 你是工程师约翰·史密斯，对吗？
lines.raw: You are John Smith, the engineer, aren't you? | 你是工程师约翰·史密斯，对吗？

lines.english: That's right.
lines.chinese: 没错。
lines.raw: That's right. | 没错。

lines.english: You work for the Overseas Engineering Company, don't you?
lines.chinese: 你在海外工程公司工作，对吗？
lines.raw: You work for the Overseas Engineering Company, don't you? | 你在海外工程公司工作，对吗？

lines.english: No, I don't.
lines.chinese: 不，我不是。
lines.raw: No, I don't. | 不，我不是。

lines.english: I'm John Smith the telephone engineer and I'm repairing your telephone line.
lines.chinese: 我是电话工程师约翰·史密斯，我正在修理你的电话线。
lines.raw: I'm John Smith the telephone engineer and I'm repairing your telephone line. | 我是电话工程师约翰·史密斯，我正在修理你的电话线。
